headline: Bunge Global SA (BG) Outlines Lavish Shareholder Return Plan
summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) is among the must-buy non-tech stocks to invest in now. On March 17, Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) announced a debt offering for $1.2 billion. The global agribusiness and food company said the offering involved senior unsecured notes in two tranches. The first part comprised $500 million of notes at 4.800% notes […]
